L1.head: Integration of microfluidic reactors and machine learning algorithms
L1.claim: 整合使得基于在线光谱表征的实时反应条件调整成为可能

L1.head: real-time adjustments to reaction conditions
L1.tail: rapid synthesis and optimization of plasmonic nanoparticles
L1.claim: 实时调整加速了等离激元纳米粒子的合成与优化

L1.head: rapid synthesis and optimization of plasmonic nanoparticles
L1.claim: 快速合成与优化增强了对纳米粒子光学性质的控制

L2.head: Use of microfluidic reactors
L2.tail: continuous flow and automated mixing of reagents
L2.claim: 微流体反应器的使用实现了试剂的连续流动和自动混合

L2.head: continuous flow and automated mixing of reagents
L2.claim: 连续流动和自动混合加速了多维化学空间的探索

L2.head: exploration of multidimensional chemical space
L2.tail: generation of diverse nanoparticle shapes and compositions
L2.claim: 多维化学空间探索产生了更多样的纳米粒子形貌和组成

L2.head: Machine learning techniques (Bayesian optimization)
L2.claim: 机器学习技术通过分析历史实验数据识别最佳反应条件

L2.head: analysis of historical data
L2.claim: 数据分析识别出最优反应条件以获得目标光学性质

L2.head: optimal reaction conditions
L2.claim: 最优条件减少了纳米粒子合成中的试错过程

L3.head: Combination of microfluidic reactors and Bayesian optimization
L3.claim: 整合构建了闭环系统以实现合成参数的动态调整

L3.head: closed-loop system
L3.claim: 闭环系统利用实时光谱反馈指导参数调整

L3.head: real-time spectroscopic feedback
L3.claim: 光谱反馈直接调整试剂流速和浓度以精确控制合成条件

L3.head: Online spectral characterization with deep neural networks
L3.claim: 在线光谱表征与深度学习结合通过数据训练模型

L3.head: trained model
L3.claim: 训练后的模型可预测不同合成参数的实验结果

L3.head: model predictions
L3.claim: 模型预测通过迭代优化实现目标纳米粒子特性
